steps.title: Read the plant relationships
steps.content: The colon introduces several connected roles: maize supports bean vines, squash discourages weeds, and beans enrich the soil for the other plants. The blank must describe a web with many interrelated parts.

steps.title: Choose the connected meaning
steps.content: A means impossible to understand, but the relationship is explained clearly. B means decorative, while the roles are practical. C means hidden or poorly known, which does not fit the named system. The word meaning complexly interconnected fits the described web. The answer is D.
